scope: C1 — Current universe bottleneck audit: produce a concise engineering note with real constraints and near-term remedies.
C2 — Scale-safe defaults / safeguards: conservative pagination/batching, explicit limits/truncation for UI payloads, query hygiene improvements, instrumentation where missing. No broad infra rewrite.
C3 — S&P 500 readiness verdict: grounded, evidence-based (not aspirational).

findings.title: Factor validation cadence — per-factor panel re-scan + row-by-row Supabase insert + silent-truncation risk
findings.patch_7_action: deferred (high-risk; requires migration + batch RPC); remediation captured as carry-forward CF-7·1

findings.title: governance_scan dedupe N+1 (list_packets per spec)
findings.patch_7_action: FIXED in C2a — single _build_existing_evaluation_index call before the loop, O(1) hash index membership check

findings.title: Bundle joined fetch — repeated panel fetches during bundle build
Today payload unbounded — /api/today/spectrum returns all rows, _horizon_lens_compare rebuilds spectrums multiple times, persist_message_snapshots per-row upserts
findings.patch_7_action: PARTIALLY FIXED in C2b — rows_limit param + truncated/total_rows metadata; _horizon_lens_compare and per-row upserts deferred

findings.title: Queue / packet retention absence — count_packets_by_layer full-table scans, no TTL/archive
Research structured lookup linear scan — up to 200 packets scanned per ask

c2a_governance_scan_n_plus_1_hoist.before: deduplicate_specs called store.list_packets(ValidationPromotionEvaluationV1, ...) inside the per-spec loop — O(K) store reads per tick where K = number of candidate specs.
c2a_governance_scan_n_plus_1_hoist.after: deduplicate_specs now calls _build_existing_evaluation_index(store, limit=max(200, 2*K)) once before the loop, then performs O(1) membership checks against an in-memory set. Semantics unchanged (same 4-tuple equality as the legacy _existing_evaluation_matches helper).

c2b_today_spectrum_rows_limit.api_contract: /api/today/spectrum now accepts optional ?rows_limit=N (capped at 1000). When None, behaves exactly as before except the output declares total_rows + truncated so clients can surface the truth. Rows are sliced AFTER all business logic has run (rank/quintile/movement are computed against the full population so top-N slicing does not lie about rank).
c2b_today_spectrum_rows_limit.object_detail_correctness: build_today_object_detail_payload explicitly requests rows_limit=TODAY_SPECTRUM_MAX_ROWS_LIMIT so it still finds specific assets regardless of rank.

c2c_replay_lineage_limit_cap.api_contract: /api/replay/governance-lineage now accepts optional ?limit=N capped at 500; response payload includes the limit used.

c2d_perf_instrumentation.rationale: Stderr JSON is trivially tail-grep-able and does not contaminate stdout payloads. Operators can grep 'metis_perf' across harness-tick logs to answer 'what is slow at scale?' without adding a tracing dependency.

what_is_already_sufficient_at_500_ticker: governance_scan tick cost (C2a hoist makes it O(1) store reads regardless of K)
Today UI payload size (C2b rows_limit + truncated metadata)
Replay lineage UI payload size (C2c limit cap)
what_still_blocks_full_sp500_coverage: factor validation cadence (F1) — row-by-row Supabase insert dominates; needs batch RPC + migration
bundle joined fetch duplication (F3) — repeated panel fetches during bundle build
queue / packet retention policy (F5) — count_packets_by_layer full scans will grow with queue size
research structured lookup linear scan (F6) — needs indexed lookup (asset_id, horizon) instead of 200-row scan
next_concrete_patch_scope_sketch: CF-7·3  research structured (asset_id, horizon) index or packet-level filter (F6)
CF-7·4  packet_store retention / archival + queue counter cache (F5)
c3_sp500_readiness_verdict.honest_framing: This patch is readiness work toward S&P 500, NOT the S&P 500 rollout itself. The verdict is evidence-based: what was safely fixable without infra rewrite has been fixed; what requires migration/RPC work is explicitly deferred with a named carry-forward ID.
